reviews.author: C E
reviews.text: The best Chiropractor I’ve ever been to. And, I have been seeing chiropractors for over 20 years for adjustments. Dr. Hieshetter is extremely knowledgeable and goes above and beyond. She was very thorough in going over my medical history and I felt relief after the first visit. Everyone at the clinic were extremely helpful. Book your appointment now, you will not regret it. Also, Dr Hieshetter was amazing with my service dog as well.

reviews.author: Sheena Gasque
reviews.text: They were able to help me after I had been brushed off by both the ER and Ortho. The doctor truly took the time to listen to my concerns and then worked on a plan to help get me out of pain. I can’t say enough good things about them—I’m so grateful for the care I received.

reviews.author: Shelly Kosht
reviews.text: Dr. Kristin Hieshetter and the team came to GE HEALTHCARE for our EHS fair. I told her about an old injury that was starting to resurface and she was the first person that explained to me how the whiplash I experienced years ago affected me. When I came in for my appt, first thing I noticed is how friendly and helpful the staff is. The atmosphere is very calming and relaxed. Dr. Hieshetter went over my x-ray with me and what her plan was for my treatment. If you're looking for a chiropractor that will adjust you and send you on your way this isn't the place. If you're looking for someone that listens and will assess your structure before making adjustments, then this is your place. I honestly can't think of a better chiropractic experience I've ever had before.

reviews.author: Patricia Hyman
reviews.text: Dr Oldenkamp and Staff are phenomenal! They are so kind, compassionate, and most of all knowledgeable about wellness. They go above and beyond to help patients. Their care is very much appreciated. Florence is fortunate to have Integrative Health Solutions  offering their services.

reviews.author: Kimberly Tumbleson
reviews.text: I went in with extreme back pain, hardly able to drive or complete simple tasks. After only one adjustment I immediately felt relief. After 3 weeks of treatments, I am pain free. Dr. Derek Oldenkamp is amazing and I now refer to him as the “Bone Whisperer.” The staff are all friendly and treat you like family. They truly care about each patient and I highly recommend them.
